item.title: Added to the list of things the right wants to destroy: libraries
item.description: https://www.kentucky.com/news/politics-government/article260428187.html They lost, and then in a day got it back on and passed. All so the right wing can politicize literally, books. In general, just… however wherever they can. Really worried we are living through the preamble to a true dark spot in humanity.

item.title: Digitool's massive meme cleanse part #130

A few more stolen from Reddit than usual, decided to clear that folder for once Also took a few from my last dump because I liked them and it died
... 104
Unfortunately he turned out to be a cryoto bro
I do know some Saxophones
I might be pansexual and Pansexual
Yuo about right
No context, but accurate
Makes sense, cardboard is usually used for decorating
Rat tax Fiver, Daisy, and Jasmine eating the brocoli

item.title: I just want to be able to keep working...
item.description:
One weeks worth cost of this medication would cover all my bills combined, with the exception of my health insurance premium.
I have a good job. A job that until recently was a very well paying job. Cost of living increases have pretty much shot that through the head though.
I could do it. It would wipe out my entire bank account, and I'd not have money to pay my property taxes though. I need my house, it's kind of a necessity.
The cost of all healthcare is just too goddamned high. And the assistance programs can't assist for very long because money is finite, and there are so many people applying for the assistance programs.
item.dc:creator: DirigoTuSequere

item.title: A Godzilla Museum Just opened in Japan
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007
